message:
chore(beads): sync issue store state (bd-2nzo8.1.3 closed, swarm coordination updates)

Routine `br sync --flush-only` output capturing coordination made by
the 9-agent swarm (4 cc + 5 cod) working on FrankenSQLite today.  No
source changes here — just exporting the sqlite store to JSONL so
later `br ready` / `bv triage` calls see the same state as the DB.

Most notably: bd-2nzo8.1.3 (FTS5 baseline harness) flips to `closed`
now that the harness + integration test + verify script are checked
in, leaving bd-2nzo8.1.4 and .1.5 (shadow-backed FTS5 work) as the
ready-to-pick items.
